scripts.app:install: tauri build && rm -rf /Applications/Crumb.app && ditto src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Crumb.app /Applications/Crumb.app && codesign --force --deep --options runtime --sign - /Applications/Crumb.app && /System/Library/Frameworks/CoreServices.framework/Frameworks/LaunchServices.framework/Support/lsregister -f /Applications/Crumb.app
